{"parts":[{"tool_name":"tool_docs","content":"List all available tools for an app connected by the user.

The <app_tools> section of the system prompt lists the available app slugs.
Returns a formatted list of all available tools, their description, and their parameters for the given app slug.

Args:
    app_slug: The app slug to list tools for.","tool_call_id":"call_aiQpOeUjLclIZs5sFZADDKLW","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-08T20:15:04.327887Z","part_kind":"tool-return"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
